## Summary

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` when UI/user flows changed

## Product/Safety Checklist

- [ ] No public negative counters added.
- [ ] User-facing static UI is bilingual.
- [ ] Trust-boundary input is validated.
- [ ] Auth/ownership/privacy implications were checked.
- [ ] Loading, empty, error, and disabled states were considered.
- [ ] Docs/env/migrations were updated if needed.

## Screenshots

Attach screenshots for visible UI changes.
